title: Data from a previous Campaigner version was found
description: You can import projects, characters, factions, notes, and related data from version 0.2.0 once. The old database will be opened read-only.
successDescription: Your data has been moved. Reload the app so the interface can read the imported projects and catalogs.
uploadsCopied: The uploads folder was processed. Existing files were not overwritten.
uploadsNotFound: The previous version uploads folder was not found, so data was imported without copying files.
checkFailed: Could not check for previous version data
importFailed: Could not import previous version data
skipFailed: Could not save the migration skip choice
skipSuccess: Previous version import will not be offered again
